prompt: Add the image 2 on top of the image 1, so the image 1 looks like a background with slightly lower transparency.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by overlaying image 2, centered, on top of it. Adjust image 1 to serve as a background layer, subtly reducing its opacity so it has a low level of transparency, allowing image 2 to remain clearly visible.
objects: Abstract organic shapes (as translucent background layer)
Various shades of brown/beige/tan (in background shapes)
